title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Contract Lens: External Unknown
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts external unknown increment in a runtime-validated public data adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
